body.title: Sleep pass consolidation — integrate day's accretions into running themes + merge duplicates
body.result: 0dcc387b — Offline consolidation pass. New pr_consolidation.py module with pr_consolidate, pr_consolidate_all, compute_weight_delta. Activity weight formula: exchange=1.0, marker=3.0, commitment=5.0; weighted * 0.01 capped at 0.10 active delta; -0.02 inactive decay; clamped to [0.0, 2.0]. Writes consolidation_summary memory back into facia subtree. pr_consolidate_all skips dormant/archived. Forensic log at logs/pr_consolidation.log. 13 new tests covering pure formula + behavior + clamps + error handling. 2013 total pass, zero regressions. Wiring into D353 sleep tick deferred — exposed as tools, future ticket integrates the cadence.
body.description:
Extend existing sleep consolidation (D353) to walk recent persistent-relationship accretions and integrate them. Offline, runs during idle periods. Matches biological hippocampal-cortical consolidation during sleep.

WHAT CONSOLIDATION DOES:
- Walk all memories with pr_facia_id created since last consolidation
- Cluster co-activated memories via Hebbian edge analysis — recurring themes get identified
- Merge duplicate observations (same exchange mentioned twice in different forms)
- Update the facia's cumulative_investment_weight based on activity level + explicit markers + emotional valence history
- Prune noise (one-off mentions without follow-up, truly stale entries past a retention threshold)
- Strengthen within-facia edges so future retrieval pulls cluster-mates together
- Write a consolidation_summary memory to the facia subtree documenting what was integrated this pass

DEPENDS ON: T-pr-accretion (needs accretion writes to consolidate).

IMPLEMENTATION: add consolidate_persistent_relationships() function. Wire into the existing sleep/idle tick cadence. Forensic log to logs/pr_consolidation.log.

TESTS: accrete N memories in a facia subtree, run consolidation, assert cluster summary created, duplicates merged, weight updated. Dormant facia with no recent accretions: consolidation pass leaves it alone.

INERTIA: MEDIUM. cognition/ + tools/.
